name: sentinel
description: AI-powered contextual security auditing platform. Performs offensive-minded SAST: taint flow tracing, attack graph generation, exploit chain narratives, and hardening checklists.
author: Wembie

tools.name: sentinel_audit
tools.description: Full deep security audit of a codebase

tools.name: sentinel_surface
tools.description: Fast attack surface map: endpoints, auth entry points, data exposure

tools.name: sentinel_trace
tools.description: Taint flow: user input to dangerous sinks (SQLi, RCE, SSRF paths)

tools.name: sentinel_attack_graph
tools.description: Trust boundary and privilege escalation graph (Mermaid)

tools.name: sentinel_logic
tools.description: IDOR, BAC, unvalidated redirects, business logic flaws

tools.name: sentinel_diff
tools.description: Security impact of a git diff or PR

tools.name: sentinel_harden
tools.description: Hardening checklist from live codebase scan

tools.name: sentinel_exploit_chain
tools.description: Full exploitation chain narrative for a specific finding

tools.name: sentinel_report
tools.description: Export audit as markdown, JSON, or SARIF
